maturity_legend.supported: CI-qualified positive and adversarial/failure proofs are landed; residual risk is documented and bounded.
maturity_legend.provisional: Implementation landed with positive and/or live proof; one or more CI-qualification, adversarial, or scale gaps remain (named per-claim).
maturity_legend.experimental: Implementation may be partial; no CI-qualified adversarial proof; claim is recorded as a target, not a guarantee.

claims.title: Per-principal attribution
claims.maturity_note: Tamper tests use HMAC keys, not Ed25519 per-principal signing; the envelope/signature path is exercised but full per-principal asymmetric signing chain (regista Plan 026) is not yet exercised in suite-level interop.

claims.title: Tamper detection
claims.maturity_note: Multi-field/cross-event tamper patterns not in scope of the current test; deletion detection requires CL-012 (external anchoring, experimental).

holistic_review_findings.note: Doctor requires top-level ok boolean; legacy compatibility path removed (doctor.py:235-242).

claims.title: Secret safety

holistic_review_findings.note: Canonical identifier gate installed; deployment docs use placeholders.
Closed in agent-notes: REGISTA_DSN no longer satisfies the native agent-notes DSN.

claims.maturity_note: No secret backend CI-qualified; no dedicated secret-leak negative test.

claims.title: Key rotation safety
claims.maturity_note: Positive proof via Ed25519 revocation test; full replay-level revocation detection not yet exercised.

holistic_review_findings.note: Anchor commits to content; bundle v2 export + offline verification incl. event signatures.
Receipt concurrency safe; cross-segment chain verification implemented.

claims.title: Offline verification

holistic_review_findings.note: Live proof PASSED against a real Claude Code session 2026-07-11.

claims.maturity_note: Manual operator runbook, not yet a CI job (needs live harness + store). Bundled key registry comes from the same store as the events; auditor must cross-check fingerprints out-of-band (tracked as regista WI-209, bundle v3).

holistic_review_findings_summary.note: Closed in agent-notes (REGISTA_DSN no longer satisfies the native agent-notes DSN).
